==== asyncSuperDefaultParameters.tlua (22 errors) ====
    class B {
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
          ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'B'.
        m() {
        ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'm'.
            ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
            return 1;
        }
    }
    
    class C extends B {
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
          ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'C'.
            ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                    ~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
                    ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'B'.
        f() {
        ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'f'.
            ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
            local g = async (b = super.m()) => b;
                                 ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2660: 'super' can only be referenced in members of derived classes or object literal expressions.
            return g();
        }
    
        async h(b = super.m()) {
        ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
        ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'async'.
              ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'h'.
                ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'b'.
                    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2660: 'super' can only be referenced in members of derived classes or object literal expressions.
                               ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
            return b;
        }
    }
